note: Illustrative, curated evaluation sample for the live demo. NOT the authoritative test set - the numbers in the README/Phase 4 come from the held-out split of the Davidson dataset. This small set exists so a reviewer can watch the model be scored in the browser. No slurs; hate_speech items target protected attributes with dehumanization/exclusion, which is what the class is defined as.

examples.text: People of that religion are subhuman and should be banned from the country.
examples.label: hate_speech

examples.text: Women are inferior and shouldn't be allowed to vote or hold real jobs.
examples.label: hate_speech

examples.text: Immigrants from that region are a disease our towns need to get rid of.
examples.label: hate_speech

examples.text: Gay people are an abomination and don't deserve the same rights as everyone else.
examples.label: hate_speech

examples.text: Disabled people are a burden on society and should be shut away.
examples.label: hate_speech

examples.text: That ethnic group is nothing but criminals and parasites.
examples.label: hate_speech

examples.text: We should keep those foreigners out; they're animals, not real people.
examples.label: hate_speech

examples.text: Followers of that faith are all terrorists and should be deported on sight.
examples.label: hate_speech

examples.text: Trans people are defective and a threat to normal families.
examples.label: hate_speech

examples.text: People from that country are stupid by nature and can't be trusted.
examples.label: hate_speech

examples.text: This referee is a complete idiot and should never work a game again.
examples.label: offensive

examples.text: Shut up, you absolute moron, nobody asked for your opinion.
examples.label: offensive

examples.text: This restaurant is garbage and the staff are clueless jerks.

examples.label: offensive

examples.text: This app is absolute crap and the developers are clowns.

examples.text: You played like an embarrassing clown out there today.

examples.text: That political party is full of idiots and I can't stand them.

examples.text: Can you recommend a good book for the weekend?

examples.text: The train was a little late but I still made my meeting.
